nl_query: What is the average time between exam schedule creation and board creation?
failed_sql: SELECT avg(T2.created_at - T1.created_at) AS avg_time FROM exam_schedule_cache AS T1 JOIN board AS T2 ON T2.exam_id = T1.id WHERE T2.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
